title: TEAS ProofRecord
description: Canonical evidence-with-checksum that a WorkOrder ran and passed. Reconciles handoff's witnessed LedgerEvent (redb, blake3 action_hash), the execution-framework *.proof.json (sha256 checksums), and planning-spine-v0 proof-record.schema.json (git heads). Heals DOMAIN_MODEL contradiction 9.2: one versioned ProofRecord; the handoff redb ledger is the authority, proof_ledger.jsonl is an export mirror. Proof status overrides any card/CSV claim.

proof_schema_version.description: Versioned; supersedes lifeos-planning-spine.proof-record.v0 and the exec-framework proof_schema_version 1.0.

status.description: Terminal outcome. Source→canonical mapping: execution-framework {completed,complete,passed}→completed; handoff {Done/passed}→passed; both success values retained to preserve each context's vocabulary. failed/error = failure; rolled_back = reverted.

commands_run.description: Actual commands executed (real execution only — Law 4).

verification_output.description: Raw output of the verification_command / test_commands (string) or a structured result object.

checksums.description: path -> sha256 of every changed file.

action_hash.description: blake3 witness hash linking this record into the append-only ledger witness chain.

prev_action_hash.description: Previous witness hash; chains the ledger for tamper-evidence.

evidence.description: URIs of supporting artifacts (evidence triple: task/pr/validation, etc.).

next_action.description: The next Decision/Action to emit (the machine-readable 'what to do now').
